name: Parity: baseline FX_9_Slot, no extras
expected: Path A and Path B produce identical PnL/trades/qty/clip

name: Parity: RBO state machine (Any side, cancel_other)
expected: RBO breakouts trigger identically on both paths

name: Parity: trailing pf_sl + trailing pf_tgt (post-hoc clip)
expected: Identical pf_clip_reason and clip timestamp on both paths

name: Parity: move-SL-to-cost + trail_after + per-slot trailing SL
expected: Move-to-cost arms identically; trailing ratchet matches
diff_summary: pnl A=$-53.52 B=$-63.54 drift=10.02; trades A=8 B=9

name: Parity: Range Breakout multi-leg (1+2+3 lots, alice ×2.0)
expected: Identical leg-quantity ratios and fill timestamps

name: Path B: 3-month range with intraday entry window (per-day chunked)
expected: path_b='all'; per-day BacktestDataConfig chunking handles range without OOM

name: Path B: run_on_days=[Mon,Wed,Fri] — gaps in chunked data configs
expected: Tue/Thu skipped at chunk-emit time; fills cluster on M/W/F

name: Path B: 5-minute entry window — micro-chunked data configs
expected: Few fills, all near 12:00 UTC; engine handles tiny per-day windows

name: Path B: RBO RangeHigh-only across 5-day range (daily reset)
expected: RBO state machine resets each UTC midnight; new range each day

name: RBO Any + cancel_other_side + 1-min buffer (deferred-DONE phase)
expected: Breakout fires once per side; deferred DONE collapses next bar

name: RBO + run_on_days=[Tue,Thu] — only 2 days have RBO ranges
expected: Mon/Wed/Fri filtered before RBO sees them; range built only Tue+Thu

name: RBO with monitoring at UTC midnight — multi-day reset boundary
expected: Each UTC midnight resets phase to IDLE; new range built day 2+

name: RBO + reverse-on-SL — re-exec bypasses RBO entry gate
expected: Initial breakout gated by RBO; subsequent reverses fire freely

name: Trailing SL: 0.001 step / 0.0005 offset — micro-ratchets
expected: SL ratchets dozens of times per profitable trade; never loosens

name: Move-to-Cost + trail_after — trailing suppressed until cost hit
expected: trailing ratchet only after move-to-cost fires (per-position one-shot)

name: Portfolio trailing SL: 5/2 ratchet across many small wins
expected: pf_sl ratchets every $5 of cumulative profit; tightens by $2

name: Portfolio TP trailing with profit lock minimum ($10)
expected: Once profit ≥$20, target floats; can't drop below $10 floor

name: Path B: runaway ×100,000 with full bundle — cap MUST clamp
expected: avg_fill_qty clamped to 10M; engine survives all toggles together

name: Path B: alice ×2.0 + RBO + trailing pf_sl
expected: qty = 2× baseline across 9 slots; RBO + pf_sl interact correctly

name: Path B: trader_safe ×0.01 + full bundle — tiny exposure
expected: avg_fill_qty == 1% baseline; trailing pf_sl rarely binds (small $$)

name: Cross-path stress: alice on Path A
expected: Path A baseline for E21

name: Cross-path stress: alice on Path B (no shared state from E21a)
expected: Path B sees same alice multiplier; no leakage from prior Path A run

name: Squareoff time == entry_end_time (same bar fires both gates)
expected: Squareoff wins; no fills past 15:00 UTC; engine handles ordering

name: DST transition (Mar 8-12 2024) with NY squareoff 10:00
expected: ZoneInfo handles DST shift on 2024-03-10; squareoff hits at right UTC offset
